remember: Recall the definition of Accounting and its importance.
Describe the historical development of Accounting.
Mention the primary users of Accounting information.
understand: Explain the purpose and scope of Accounting.
Differentiate between Financial and Managerial Accounting.
Describe the role of Accounting in business decision-making.
apply: Identify the elements of Accounting Equation.
Apply the Accounting Equation to a given scenario.
Prepare a simple Accounting Equation statement.
analyze: Analyze the impact of Accounting information on business decisions.
Evaluate the relevance of Accounting information for investors and creditors.
Compare and contrast different Accounting systems.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept of Accounting and its importance in the management of business.
Describe the primary users of Accounting information and the purpose of Accounting reports.
Define Accounting Equation and explain its importance in Accounting.
board_exam_objectives: Define Accounting and explain its importance in business.
Identify the primary users of Accounting information.
Explain the purpose and scope of Accounting in business.
